top_signals.title: Senate crypto bill would ban federal officials — including presidents — from issuing digital assets
top_signals.summary: A new version of the Clarity Act would impose the first limits on federal officials sponsoring or issuing cryptocurrency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UPS labels allegedly diverted $2 million in Nike shoes, indictment says
top_signals.summary:
Federal prosecutors say 12 people participated in a $2 million cargo theft conspiracy targeting Nike’s Memphis logistics center. The indictment describes how unauthorized UPS labels allegedly redirected thousands of shoe cartons across the country.

The post UPS labels allegedly diverted $2 million in Nike shoes, indictment says appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Indonesia's free meal scheme hit by further turmoil as program boss quits
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Won’t Give Up on Saylor’s Strategy, Sees 170% Upside
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. is confronting a collapse of confidence almost everywhere — except among Wall Street analysts.
